title: Cross-Contract Event Scanner
description: Scan ALL contracts on a chain for a specific event by topic hash — find every ERC-20 Transfer, every Uniswap Swap, or any custom event across the entire chain within a block range.
useCase: Find every Uniswap V3 Swap event on Base within the last 1000 blocks — build cross-protocol DEX aggregators, airdrop eligibility scanners, and chain-wide analytics.

keyParams.topicHash: keccak256 hash of the event signature (e.g. Transfer(address,address,uint256))
